name: Peanutty Chewy Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Grease a 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
3. In a large bowl, stir together flour, granulated sugar, cocoa, brown sugar, baking powder, and salt.
4. Add butter; mix until the mixture is well blended and resembles coarse crumbs.
5. Add eggs; mix well.
6. Spoon the mixture into the prepared pan, pressing firmly onto the bottom of the pan.
7. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes or until the mixture is set.
8. Remove from the oven and sprinkle peanut butter chips on top.
9. Drizzle sweetened condensed milk evenly over the chips and coconut.
10. Return to the oven and bake for an additional 20 to 25 minutes, or until lightly browned on top.
11. Cool completely in the pan on a wire rack.
12. Cut into bars. Yield: About 24 bars.
